generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in supporting our allies. But have you noticed how some politicians talk about 'burden-sharing'? It's just code for cutting our commitments while leaving our families less safe. My friend's son is in the National Guard - he tells me our allies respect us *because* we stand by them. Why risk that for vague promises of savings? #StandByOurAllies #NationalSecurity
